prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约1299名，2022年跃升至约706名，2024年约602名，2025年约563名。2021至2022年大幅前移约593名，此后逐年小幅前移，近3年累计前移约143名，整体呈持续上升趋势；2025年基准位次约563名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021-2022年均为61人，2024-2025年均为57人，2026年（招生计划文件）仍为57人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，理工类；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第19名→2022年第18名→2023年第16名→2024年第14名→2025年第13名→2026年第14名，稳居全国Top20，近年排名显著提升；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校迅速确认不当行为并暂停教学，展现了高效的舆情应对机制；2025年周期亦有偏负面事件但处理及时。抖音热度总排名第47位（较热），作为国防七子之一保持一定关注度。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共12个学科：信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A、光学工程A、管理科学与工程A、力学A-、化学工程与技术A-、工商管理A-、数学A-、物理学A-。优势学科数量多、覆盖面广，对工科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以工科试验班大类为主，涵盖人工智能、机器人工程、数据科学与大数据技术、计算机科学与技术等当前高热专业方向，社会关注度持续升温。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争显著加剧。；北京理工大学位于北京市，与天津市地理邻近，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力。该校在天津招生规模稳定（57人），占比较为稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势（2021年1299→2025年563）、2026年招生计划持平、学校软科排名稳居Top20且持续上升、优势学科实力突出、专业方向高热、天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%等因素，预计2026年竞争将进一步加剧，位次有望继续小幅前移。预测最低位次约543名，区间481–605名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2021 was approximately 1299, jumping to about 706 in 2022, around 602 in 2024, and about 563 in 2025. From 2021 to 2022, it moved forward significantly by about 593 places, and then gradually moved forward year by year, with a cumulative forward movement of about 143 places in the past 3 years, showing a continuous upward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 563; the university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Tianjin was 61 students from 2021 to 2022, and 57 students from 2024 to 2025, and remains 57 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, focusing on science and engineering; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been continuously rising: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly in the national Top 20, with significant improvement in recent years; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the university quickly confirmed the misconduct and suspended teaching, demonstrating an efficient public opinion response mechanism; there were also somewhat negative events in the 2025 cycle, but they were handled promptly. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th overall (relatively popular), maintaining a certain level of attention as one of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense.' No obvious record of admission cut-off drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-. The number of advantageous disciplines is large and covers a wide range, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly engineering experimental classes, covering currently hot majors such as Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, and Computer Science and Technology, with continuously increasing social attention. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, geographically close to Tianjin, naturally attracting Tianjin candidates. Its enrollment scale in Tianjin is stable (57 students), with a relatively stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings (from 1299 in 2021 to 563 in 2025), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the university's stable Top 20 ranking in Soft Science with continuous improvement, outstanding advantageous disciplines, high popularity of majors, and a significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin candidates, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, and the ranking is likely to continue moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 543, with a range of 481–605.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 543, range 481-605. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Xu Teli Talent Class, Electronic Information Experimental Class, Information Science and Technology) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Excellence Class, Future Precision Engineering Technology) as a sprint target, and Tier 3 (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class, Top-Notch Plan, Science and Materials Elite Class) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., entering within 480), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
